channel.title: Just In
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026, Australian Broadcasting Corporation. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: MPs join calls for Wyndham mayor to resign over character reference saga
item.description: Federal and state MPs have added their voices to demands that Preet Singh step down from his role in Melbourne's west after resident protests and a vote of no confidence by fellow councillors.
item.dc:creator: Margaret Paul

media:group.media:description: Federal MP Joanne Ryan and state MP John Lister have both spoken in parliament about Preet Singh's refusal to resign as mayor of Wyndham.

item.title: Taser-death inquest told officers had 'plenty of time' to deal with 95yo
item.description: A senior NSW Ambulance officer tells the Clare Nowland inquest that emergency services could have taken more time responding to the 95-year-old's dementia-related aggression.
item.dc:creator: Adriane Reardon and Isla Evans

media:group.media:description: Clare Nowland, who had dementia, died in Cooma Hospital after being tasered in an aged-care facility.

item.title: Breaking: Woman dead, man arrested after stabbing in Canberra
item.description: Paramedics treated the woman for critical injuries at the scene but she was declared dead on her way to hospital.

media:group.media:description: A crime scene has been established in the Canberra suburb of O'Connor.

item.title: Locals worried as homicide squad investigates suspicious death in WA farming town
item.description: WA police are probing the suspicious death of a man in the farming town of Katanning.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Chounding

media:group.media:description: Police on Marri Drive early this morning.

item.title: Queensland minister denies wrongdoing over shares disclosure
item.description: Under-fire Child Safety Minister Amanda Camm has defended updating her parliamentary register of interests, labelling opposition attacks as "gutter politics".
item.dc:creator: Alex Brewster

media:group.media:description: Queensland Minister for the Prevention of Domestic and Family Violence Amanda Camm.

item.title: Queensland man's 2021 disappearance to be probed in coronial inquest
item.description: Nathan Brosnan, 35, went missing from Logan while on parole. He is suspected to have died, but his body has never been found.
item.dc:creator: Heloise Vyas

media:group.media:description: Nathan Donald Brosnan went missing from Logan, south of Brisbane, almost five years ago.

item.title: Power to cut funding and stricter 'permanence' test under new NDIS
item.description: Legislation designed to save $35 billion in NDIS spending is introduced to parliament, revealing new powers for the minister to cut funding to classes of supports, automate some decisions and create requirements for prospective participants to exhaust all other treatment options before entering the NDIS.
item.dc:creator: Jake Evans

media:group.media:description: Mark Butler would gain powers to cut funding supports below the level deemed "reasonable and necessary" under new NDIS legislation.

item.title: Email reveals Jewish group warned police about Bondi gunman in 2019
item.description: A Jewish security agency raised concerns about Bondi Beach gunman Naveed Akram years before the terror attack that left 15 people dead, a document shows.
item.dc:creator: Phoebe Pin

media:group.media:description: Naveed Akram is before the courts on dozens of charges over the December terrorist attack.

item.title: Suspect in custody over Wynyard shooting in Tasmania's north
item.description: Police say a man has been taken into custody as part of the ongoing investigation into a shooting yesterday, in which a man in his 30s was shot in the stomach.

media:group.media:description: Police investigating the shooting on Wednesday.

item.title: Council sells off properties at overdue rates auction
item.description: About 40 people attended the event, including buyer Nathan Casey, who snatched up a three-bedroom home for $200,000.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Jarrett

media:group.media:description: Nathan Casey bought a property at the Rockhampton Regional Council unpaid rates auction on May 14.

item.title: Passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship to arrive in Perth tomorrow
item.description: Six passengers from a cruise ship at the centre of a deadly hantavirus outbreak are testing negative for the illness and are symptom-free, the federal health minister says, as they prepare to be repatriated to Australia.
item.dc:creator: Cason Ho

media:group.media:description: The MV Hondius passengers bound for Australia landed in the Netherlands on Tuesday.

item.title: Hardwick defends Suns staffer amid AFL betting probe
item.description: Gold Coast Suns coach Damien Hardwick says team manager Mark Opie will continue his match-day duties despite being investigated by the AFL integrity unit over his links to a bookmaking firm.
item.dc:creator: Michael Doyle

media:group.media:description: Gold Coast Suns coach Damien Hardwick during the AFL Round 6 match between the Gold Coast Suns and the Essendon Bombers at Carrara Stadium on the Gold Coast, Saturday, April 18, 2026.

item.title: Police search for driver after boy left with 'life-changing' injuries
item.description: Security footage from the Sunshine Coast has been released as the young boy undergoes multiple surgeries to save his leg.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Sanders and Jessica Ross

media:group.media:description: Police have released security footage of the 4WD dual cab utility they believe was involved in the crash.

item.title: Coalition to propose permanent end to tax bracket creep
item.description: The Coalition will make a bold play to win back voters with a plan to automatically index income tax brackets to keep up with inflation.
item.dc:creator: Clare Armstrong

media:group.media:description: Opposition Leader Angus Taylor wants to permanently end tax "bracket creep".

item.title: Why Gold Coast has already won the NRL's Magic Round
item.description: One of the best parts of Magic Round is going jersey-spotting but before a ball is kicked in Brisbane the Titans have already cleaned up via their Chargers-inspired retro strip.
item.dc:creator: Nick Campton

media:group.media:description: Gold Coast players will wear their Chargers-inspired retro jersey for the first time at Magic Round.

item.title: Entire university sector accused of antisemitism failure
item.description: The special envoy on antisemitism has found not a single Australian university has met its requirements for adopting a definition of antisemitism.
item.dc:creator: Conor Duffy

media:group.media:description: The report found not a single university had meaningfully adopted the definition of antisemitism.

item.title: Queensland opposition leader apologises after contempt inquiry
item.description: A committee has recommended for Steven Miles to be found in contempt over comments he made about Deputy Premier Jarrod Bleijie in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Alex Brewster

media:group.media:description: Steven Miles has apologised over comments he made about Jarrod Bleijie.

item.title: Tasmanian government breaks flagship election promise as TasInsure overhauled
item.description: The Tasmanian government will break an election promise to start a state-owned insurance agency, instead establishing a new body to "oversee and support the insurance ecosystem".
item.dc:creator: Josh Duggan

media:group.media:description: Premier Jeremy Rockliff made a promise during the 2025 state election to establish a state-owned insurance company.

item.title: These charts show how Coles Down Down pricing patterns duped shoppers
item.description: The pricing patterns of these six products show how Coles was found to have misled consumers through its Down Down pricing patterns.
item.dc:creator: Margaret Burin, Ben Spraggon, Ashley Kyd, and Matt Liddy

item.title: Former top barrister spared jail after trying to overcharge clients
item.description: Norman O'Bryan was one of Melbourne's top barristers — until he was caught trying to overcharge his clients in a scandal described as "one of the darkest chapters" in Victorian legal history.
item.dc:creator: Kristian Silva

media:group.media:description: Former barrister Norman O'Bryan, pictured in April, was ordered to complete 600 hours of community work.

item.title: ISIS brides' arrest in Australia prompts anger in Syrian camp
item.description: The arrest of three Australian women linked to the Islamic State group sparks anger and frustration inside the Syrian refugee camp where they had lived for years.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Doran and Cherine Yazbeck

media:group.media:description: Al Roj houses people who were displaced by the fall of Islamic State.

item.title: Outback cattle station granted permit to cull 20,000 native birds
item.description: A permit to cull 20,000 native birds has been granted to a cattle station in the Northern Territory in response to an "overpopulation" of destructive and "exceptionally noisy" galahs and little corellas.
item.dc:creator: Sam Parry

media:group.media:description: A pink and grey galah.

item.title: Can you put sneakers in the washing machine? Here’s what the experts say
item.description: Experts reveal their tips on bringing your favourite sneakers back to life at home.
item.dc:creator: Amy Sheehan

media:group.media:description: Experts say some sneakers can be cleaned in a washing machine but there are a few important steps to follow.

item.title: Live: Donald Trump tells Xi Jinping they will have 'fantastic future' in bilateral meeting
item.description: The Iran war, Taiwan, trade, tariffs and AI could all feature in Donald Trump's first visit to Beijing in nearly nine years. Follow live.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Martin, Caitlin Rawling, Allyson Horn, Kai Feng, Ning Pan, and Jason Fang

media:group.media:description: Xi Jingping has met with Donald Trump in Beijing, China.

item.title: VAR drama, pitch invasion as Scottish league heads for final day shootout
item.description: Celtic's Kelechi Iheanacho scores a controversial penalty with the last kick of the game to secure a 3-2 win at Motherwell, sending the Scottish Premiership title race to a final-day showdown against leaders Heart of Midlothian.

media:group.media:description: Kelechi Iheanacho scored the winner with the final kick of the match over Motherwell.
